message:
feat(genome): support .md agent files in loadFromDisk()

Genome's loadFromDisk() now scans for both .yaml/.yml and .md files in
the agents directory, using parseAgentMarkdown for .md files. This
enables the genome to store agent specs in YAML-fronted Markdown format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
